zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibilla Morwick於大約1248年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯時，她的父親Hugh de Morewick26歲，母親Agnes de Heyford19歲。她於1264年與Roger Lumley在英國英格蘭達勒姆盧姆利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1298年7月26日在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibilla Morwick于大约1248年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯时，她的父亲Hugh de Morewick26岁，母亲Agnes de Heyford19岁。她于1264年与Roger Lumley在英国英格兰達勒姆盧姆利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1298年7月26日在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Morwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Orkney): habitational name from Marwick in Birsay (Orkney).

nameMeanings.name: Sibilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibella
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibilla Morwick was born about 1248, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Morewick, was 26 and her mother, Agnes de Heyford, was 19. She married Roger Lumley in 1264, in Lumley, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 26 July 1298, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibilla Morwick est née environ 1248, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Morewick, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Heyford, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Lumley en 1264, à Lumley, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1298, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibilla Morwick um 1248 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Morewick 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Heyford 19. Sie hat 1264 in Lumley, Durham, England, United Kingdom Roger Lumley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1298 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla Morwick è nata il circa 1248 nel Warkworth, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh de Morewick, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Heyford, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Roger Lumley nel 1264, nel Lumley, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sibilla Morwickが約1248年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Morewickは26歳，母Agnes de Heyfordは19歳であった。1264年にイギリスイギリスダルハムルムリーでRoger Lumleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1298年7月26日にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibilla Morwick(이)가 대략 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Morewick(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Heyford(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 럼리에서 Roger Lumley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 7월 26일 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla Morwick nasceu aproximadamente 1248, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Morewick, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Heyford, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Lumley em 1264, em Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibilla Morwick родилась около 1248 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Morewick было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Heyford, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Lumley в 1264 г. в местности лумли, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 26 июля 1298 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Roger Lumley en 1264, en Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1298, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
